title: WeatherStateDef
description: One weather state (plan/05 §3): Markov transitions with weights, a duration range, global flags held while active (formulas and sensors read them — sense_auditory_mult is how rain degrades hearing), and tag-scoped effect primitives at the boundaries.

description.description: One line for humans and LLMs (surfaced by the manifest).

inherits.description: Parent def ID (same kind); objects deep-merge, scalars override, arrays replace or take {"$append"/"$remove"} patches.

transitions.description: Target weather ID → weight. Missing/empty = stays here.

flags.description: Global blackboard entries held while active and removed on exit (bool/number/string).

onEnter.description: Effect primitives run when this weather begins, per entity tag.

onExit.description: Effect primitives run when this weather ends, per entity tag.
